mapper.select: SELECT DEPT_CD AS refNo, FILE_TYPE_CD AS fileTypeCd, WORK_DRIVE_NO AS "fileMeta.fileNo", FILE_NM AS "fileMeta.fileNm", SAVE_FILE_NM AS "fileMeta.saveFileNm", FILE_PATH AS "fileMeta.filePath", FILE_SIZE AS "fileMeta.fileSize", FILE_EXT AS "fileMeta.fileExt", EMP_NM AS "fileMeta.empNm", USE_YN AS "fileMeta.delYn", REG_DTM AS "fileMeta.regDtm" FROM WORK_DRIVE WHERE DEPT_CD = #{deptCd} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY WORK_DRIVE_NO DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WORK_DRIVE ( WORK_DRIVE_NO, DEPT_CD, FILE_NM, SAVE_FILE_NM, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, FILE_EXT, EMP_NM ) VALUES ( SEQ_WORK_DRIVE.NEXTVAL, #{deptCd}, #{file.fileMeta.fileNm}, #{file.fileMeta.saveFileNm}, #{file.fileMeta.filePath}, #{file.fileMeta.fileSize}, #{file.fileMeta.fileExt}, #{file.fileMeta.empNm} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE WORK_DRIVE SET USE_YN = 'N' WHERE WORK_DRIVE_NO IN
#{no}
mapper.select: SELECT WORK_DRIVE_NO AS fileNo, FILE_NM AS fileNm, SAVE_FILE_NM AS saveFileNm, FILE_PATH AS filePath, FILE_SIZE AS fileSize, FILE_EXT AS fileExt, REG_DTM AS regDtm, USE_YN AS delYn FROM WORK_DRIVE WHERE WORK_DRIVE_NO = #{fileNo} AND USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT DEPT_CD AS refNo, FILE_TYPE_CD AS fileTypeCd, WORK_DRIVE_NO AS "fileMeta.fileNo", FILE_NM AS "fileMeta.fileNm", SAVE_FILE_NM AS "fileMeta.saveFileNm", FILE_PATH AS "fileMeta.filePath", FILE_SIZE AS "fileMeta.fileSize", FILE_EXT AS "fileMeta.fileExt", EMP_NM AS "fileMeta.empNm", USE_YN AS "fileMeta.delYn", REG_DTM AS "fileMeta.regDtm" FROM WORK_DRIVE WHERE DEPT_CD = #{deptCd} AND FILE_PATH = #{filePath} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY (CASE WHEN FILE_EXT = '폴더' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) ASC, WORK_DRIVE_NO DESC
